title: Psychometric Comparison of the Standard EQ-5D to a 5 Level Version in Cancer Patients
search_query: Psychometric Comparison of the Standard EQ-5D to a 5 Level Version in Cancer Patients
notes: OBJECTIVE: The objectives of this study were: 1) to determine whether expanding the number of levels (ie, response categories) on the standard 3 level EQ-5D (EQ-5D-3L) to 5-levels (EQ-5D-5L) would improve the descriptive richness and ability of the measure to discriminate among d...
